name: premium
description: Cookbook-quality photography with elegant styling, perfect composition, and the kind of images you would frame on a wall. This mood positions GAIA Recipes as a premium culinary brand with content that rivals published cookbooks.

style.lighting: soft diffused studio light | gentle fill from below | even professional lighting
style.color_grade: neutral warm tones | clean whites | muted earthy accents
style.camera: perfectly composed overhead | 45-degree hero angle | detail macro with precision
style.composition: rule of thirds precision | curated prop styling | intentional negative space
style.props: marble surface, linen napkins, artisan ceramics, fresh herbs as garnish, copper measuring cups

copy_tone: Polished and editorial, like a cookbook foreword. Measured, intentional word choices. Descriptors feel curated — artisan, hand-selected, lovingly prepared. Quality over quantity in every phrase.
example_prompt_fragment: A perfectly styled overhead shot of a complete plant-based laksa bowl on a marble surface, artisan ceramic bowl, precisely placed garnishes of fresh coriander and lime wedge, linen napkin folded beside it, soft diffused studio lighting, clean warm neutral tones, cookbook-quality food photography with intentional negative space
